# @acp/agent-sdk public API

The frozen 1.0 export surface (docs/standards/api-versioning.md). A diff here
is an API change: additive in a minor, breaking only in a major.

export class Agent {
    readonly manifest: AgentManifest;
    model: ModelClient | undefined;
    retriever: Retriever | undefined;
    readonly handlers: Map<string, Handler>;
    readonly log: Logger;
    constructor(options: AgentOptions);
    static fromManifest(manifestPath: string, options?: {
        model?: ModelClient;
        retriever?: Retriever;
    }): Agent;
    get agentId(): string;
    get taskQueue(): string;
    capability(name: string, handler: Handler): void;
    assertComplete(): void;
    answerBuilder(): AnswerBuilder;
    execute(request: unknown): Promise<StepResult>;
    run(): Promise<void>;
}

export interface AgentOptions {
    manifest: AgentManifest;
    model?: ModelClient;
    retriever?: Retriever;
}

export function agentTaskQueue(agentId: string, version: string): string;

export class AnswerBuilder {
    readonly confidenceFloor: number;
    constructor(confidenceFloor?: number);
    cite(citation: Citation): number;
    paragraph(text: string): void;
    build(confidence: number): Answer;
    abstain(reason: string, confidence?: number): Answer;
}

const BUS_AUDIENCE: "acp:bus";

export interface BusClient {
    request(subject: string, payload: Uint8Array, options: {
        timeout: number;
    }): Promise<{
        data: Uint8Array;
    }>;
}

export interface BusTokenOptions {
    tokenUrl: string;
    clientId: string;
    clientSecret: string;
    audience?: string;
    fetchImpl?: typeof fetch;
    refreshRatio?: number;
    maxBackoffMs?: number;
    logger?: {
        warn: (obj: unknown, msg: string) => void;
        error: (obj: unknown, msg: string) => void;
    };
}

export class BusTokenSource {
    constructor(options: BusTokenOptions);
    token(): string;
    start(): Promise<void>;
    stop(): void;
    mint(): Promise<{
        token: string;
        expiresIn: number;
    }>;
}

export class CapabilityContext {
    readonly tenant: string;
    readonly taskId: string;
    readonly stepId: string;
    readonly capability: string;
    readonly delegatedToken: string | undefined;
    readonly budget: Budget | undefined;
    readonly model: ModelClient;
    readonly log: Logger;
    constructor(fields: {
        tenant: string;
        taskId: string;
        stepId: string;
        capability: string;
        delegatedToken: string | undefined;
        budget: Budget | undefined;
        model: ModelClient;
        retriever: Retriever | undefined;
        log: Logger;
    });
    retrieve(query: string, options?: {
        k?: number;
    }): Promise<Record<string, unknown>[]>;
}

export class CapabilityError extends Error {
    readonly errorClass: ErrorClass;
    readonly details: Record<string, unknown> | undefined;
    constructor(errorClass: ErrorClass, message: string, details?: Record<string, unknown>);
    toProtocol(): CapabilityErrorBody;
}

export interface CaseResult {
    name: string;
    passed: boolean;
    failures: string[];
    citedDocs: string[];
    abstained: boolean;
}

export function configureTracing(serviceName: string, options?: {
    spanProcessor?: SpanProcessor;
}): Tracer;

export interface ContextualModel extends ModelClient {
    withCallContext(context: ModelCallContext): ModelClient;
}

export function createAgentLogger(agentId: string): Logger;

const DEFAULT_CONFIDENCE_FLOOR: 0.35;

export type ErrorClass = CapabilityErrorBody['class'];

export class EvalHarness {
    constructor(agent: Agent, options?: {
        delegatedToken?: string;
    });
    run(cases: GoldenCase[]): Promise<EvalReport>;
}

export class EvalReport {
    readonly results: CaseResult[];
    readonly citationPrecision: number;
    readonly abstentionAccuracy: number;
    readonly passRate: number;
    constructor(results: CaseResult[], citationPrecision: number, abstentionAccuracy: number, passRate: number);
    get passed(): boolean;
    summary(): string;
}

export class FakeModel implements ModelClient {
    readonly script: FakeModelStep[];
    readonly calls: string[];
    constructor(script?: FakeModelStep[]);
    complete(prompt: string, _options?: {
        maxTokens?: number;
    }): Promise<ModelResponse>;
}

export type FakeModelStep = string | ModelResponse | Error | ((prompt: string) => string);

export class GatewayModel implements ContextualModel {
    constructor(options: GatewayModelOptions, context?: ModelCallContext);
    withCallContext(context: ModelCallContext): ModelClient;
    complete(prompt: string, options?: {
        maxTokens?: number;
    }): Promise<ModelResponse>;
}

export interface GatewayModelOptions {
    url: string;
    modelClass: string;
    staticPrefix?: PromptBlock[] | undefined;
    fetchImpl?: typeof fetch | undefined;
}

export interface GoldenCase {
    name: string;
    capability: string;
    input: Record<string, unknown>;
    mustContain: string[];
    mustCiteDocs: string[];
    expectAbstain: boolean;
    minConfidence: number | undefined;
    expectErrorClass: ErrorClass | undefined;
}

export function goldenCaseFromDict(raw: Record<string, unknown>): GoldenCase;

export type Handler = (ctx: CapabilityContext, input: Record<string, unknown>) => Promise<Record<string, unknown>>;

export function isContextualModel(model: ModelClient): model is ContextualModel;

const KNOWLEDGE_AUDIENCE: "acp:knowledge";

export function loadGolden(directory: string): GoldenCase[];

export type Logger<CustomLevels extends string = never, UseOnlyCustomLevels extends boolean = boolean> = BaseLogger & LoggerExtras<CustomLevels> & CustomLevelLogger<CustomLevels, UseOnlyCustomLevels>;

export interface ModelCallContext {
    delegatedToken: string | undefined;
    taskId: string;
    stepId: string;
    tenant: string;
    capability: string;
}

export interface ModelClient {
    complete(prompt: string, options?: {
        maxTokens?: number;
    }): Promise<ModelResponse>;
}

export interface ModelResponse {
    text: string;
    inputTokens?: number;
    outputTokens?: number;
    cacheReadTokens?: number;
    cacheWriteTokens?: number;
    model?: string;
}

export class NatsRetriever implements Retriever {
    constructor(options: {
        nc: BusClient;
        exchanger: TokenExchanger;
        timeoutMs?: number;
    });
    search(delegatedToken: string, query: string, options?: SearchOptions): Promise<Record<string, unknown>[]>;
}

export function reportPayload(report: EvalReport, options: {
    agentId: string;
    agentVersion: string;
    suiteDir: string;
    sdk?: string;
}): ProtocolEvalReport;

export interface Retriever {
    search(delegatedToken: string, query: string, options?: SearchOptions): Promise<Record<string, unknown>[]>;
}

export interface SearchOptions {
    k?: number;
    taskId?: string;
    stepId?: string;
}

export function suiteDigest(directory: string): string;

export class TokenExchanger {
    constructor(options: {
        tokenUrl: string;
        clientId: string;
        clientSecret: string;
        fetchImpl?: typeof fetch;
    });
    exchange(subjectToken: string, audience: string): Promise<string>;
}
